message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task only touches grounded_proposer.py (weighted tip selection). If your feature also needs this file, let's coordinate on non-overlapping regions (e.g. I only touch __init__ tip_weights param and add _select_tip_with_weights method + its call site in tip selection). What files does your feature need?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implementing cache-salt feature (removing temperature modulation) in grounded_proposer.py; need to own this file.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this same file - let's split by region instead of by file. I will only touch: GroundedProposer.__init__ (adding tip_weights param), the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program (lines ~360-371), and a new helper method _select_tip_with_weights. Please confine your cache-salt/temperature changes to propose_instruction_for_predictor (lines ~417-435) and __init__ only for your own new param(s), added separately from my tip_weights param. I'll add my __init__ param on its own line so it won't conflict with yours. Agreed?
